arts.ttl: 'He can': Jorginho makes exciting Ethan Nwaneri prediction before Arsenal face Atalanta
Ruben Dias makes telling Man City admission ahead of crunch Arsenal showdown
arts.sum: Man City defender Ruben Dias says Pep Guardiola's players are "hiding from nothing" and relish the challenge of facing Premier League title rivals Arsenal on Sunday so early on in the season

arts.ttl: Arteta: Arsenal on the right path to trophies
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta insists Arsenal are on the right path to major honours as they prepare for the start of their Champions League campaign and a huge Premier League showdown with champions Manchester City, live on Sky Sports.

arts.ttl: Jorginho on Atalanta, team spirit and Nwaneri
arts.sum: “We’ve been trying to improve every day and we need to take the lessons that we got last season,” he said. We need to be ready because it’s definitely going to be a really tough game to start.

arts.ttl: Arsenal XI vs Atalanta – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Arsenal begin their Champions League campaign with a trip to Bergamo to face Atalanta. It will be a first-ever meeting between Arsenal and Atalanta, as the Gunners look to start their European season with a positive result in the competition’s new-look format. arts.ttl: 20-year-old talent lights up UCL clash in front of watching Arsenal & Manchester United scouts
arts.sum: Arsenal and Manchester United both had scouts present to watch Borussia Dortmund against Club Brugge in the Champions League last night, with English youngster Jamie Gittens undoubtedly stealing the show. arts.ttl: Three Arsenal concerns ahead of Atalanta Champions League visit
arts.sum: Atalanta are set to host Arsenal on Thursday night in their first Champions League fixture...

arts.ttl: Martin Odegaard injury hint in Mikel Arteta footage suddenly has Arsenal fans hopeful
arts.sum: Arsenal supporters have been given hope about Martin Odegaard, who is facing a lengthy spell on the sidelines after suffering an ankle injury on international duty

arts.ttl: Arsenal urged to show ‘different face’ in Odegaard absence
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has urged Arsenal to show a ‘different face’ in the absence of injured captain Martin Odegaard. The midfielder sustained an ankle injury while representing Norway during the international break and is facing an extended spell on the sidelines. arts.ttl: Arsenal could lose star in January as Italian giants plot £25m transfer move
arts.sum: Arsenal have continued to strengthen their defence and have seen Takehiro Tomiyasu drop down Mikel Arteta's pecking order at the Emirates Stadium and he could be available for transfer
